MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, CHARLIE B. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-24-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-31-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. PLTFF PRESENTED PRIMA FACIE CASE. JUDGMENT ODERED FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES PLUS $674.34 BACK RENT AND DAMAGES. PREPARED JUDGMENT SUBMITTED BY PLTFF. EXHIBIT W/DRAWN AND RETURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHRISTENBERRY, MAUREEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 41 JONES STREET #305, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $674.34 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $674.34, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF PER COST BILL.
